title: Steelman and Critique
description: Pressure-test an idea by arguing both sides well.
content:
Here's an idea/claim: {{claim}}

First, steelman it: make the strongest honest case FOR it. Then critique it: the strongest case against, the hidden assumptions, and the conditions under which it fails. Finally, give your balanced judgment: is it right, and under what circumstances? Don't strawman either side.

variables.name: claim
variables.description: The idea or claim to test
